# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Write a GitLab CI pipeline with multiple stages where build artifacts are passed between jobs. The build job creates artifacts (binaries, configs) and deployment jobs download and execute them. Store artifacts for 30 days for team access.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline:
    image: gitlab/gitlab-runner:latest
    stage: deploy_staging

    # Get the source code from the repository.
    script:
    - /opt/deploy-artifact-staging.sh
    - sleep 1m50s

    variables:
        - GITLAB_TOKEN
        - STAGING_ENVIRONMENT_NAME

    environment:
        - S3_ACCESS_KEY_ID=staging
        - S3_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY=staging
        - REPOSITORY="https://gitlab-ci-token:${GITLAB_TOKEN}@git.com/${CI_PROJECT_PATH}.git"
        - SOURCE_TAG=$CI_COMMIT_SHA
        - ARTIFACTS_STORE_FOLDER=${STAGING_ENVIRONMENT_NAME}/$SOURCE_TAG
        - CI_JOB_TAGS="Staging-${BUILD_NUMBER}"

artifacts:
    paths: ["build"]
    expire_in: 1 month

    # Upload to S3 Bucket.
    s3:
        access-key-id: "${S3_ACCESS_KEY_ID}"
        secret-access-key: "${S3_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY}"
        region_name: us-east-1
        bucket-name: my-bucket
        base64-cache-control: "true"

image: alpine
